name: astrocal
description: AI-native scheduling: check availability, book meetings, cancel and reschedule via MCP
long_description: Astrocal lets your AI assistant manage scheduling end to end: list event types, check availability, and create, cancel, or reschedule bookings — plus join and check waitlists. This bundle wraps the published @astrocal/mcp-server stdio server and prompts you for your Astrocal API key at install.

tools.name: list_event_types
tools.description: List available event types that can be booked

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Get available booking slots for a date range

tools.name: create_booking
tools.description: Book a meeting at a specific time

tools.name: reschedule_booking
tools.description: Reschedule a booking to a new time

tools.name: list_bookings
tools.description: List bookings with optional status and event type filters

tools.name: join_waitlist
tools.description: Add an invitee to the waitlist for a fully-booked event type

tools.name: check_waitlist
tools.description: Check waitlist position for an invitee

api_key.title: Astrocal API Key
api_key.description: Your Astrocal API key. Create one at https://astrocal.dev/dashboard/connect

default_event_type_id.title: Default Event Type ID
default_event_type_id.description: Optional. The event type used when a tool call does not specify one.
